Items.Title: Cristiano Ronaldo Wears Long Sleeves in 34 Degree Heat Against Uzbekistan
Items.Description: During Portugal's 2026 FIFA World Cup match against Uzbekistan in Houston, Texas, Cristiano Ronaldo caught the attention of kit enthusiasts for his unusual shirt choice.

Items.Title: Cristiano Ronaldo shuts down reporter's Lionel Messi question after Portugal win
Items.Description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored twice as Portugal thrashed Uzbekistan 5-0 at the World Cup before the Portugal icon was asked about Lionel Messi
Items.Author: Joseph McBride,Scott Trotter

Items.Title: 'I'm back' - record-breaking Ronaldo answers critics
Items.Description: Portugal forward Cristiano Ronaldo provides the perfect response to those that doubted him as he becomes the first player to score at six World Cups.
